powerpagecomponent.content: { "appendquerystring": false, "associatecurrentportaluser": false, "attachfile": false, "attachfileallowmultiple": false, "attachfilerequired": false, "attachfilerestrictaccept": false, "autogeneratesteps": false, "captcharequired": false, "entityname": "hx_servicerequest", "entitypermissionsenabled": true, "entitysourcetype": 756150001, "forceallfieldsrequired": false, "formname": "Service Request - SharePoint Documents", "geolocation_displaymap": false, "geolocation_enabled": false, "geolocation_maptype": 756150000, "hideformonsuccess": true, "mode": 100000001, "onsuccess": 756150000, "populatereferenceentitylookupfield": false, "portaluserlookupattributeisactivityparty": false, "recommendedfieldsrequired": false, "recordidquerystringparametername": "id", "recordnotfoundmessage": "We could not find a service request for this link, or you do not have permission to view it.", "recordsourceallowcreateonnull": false, "redirecturlappendentityidquerystring": false, "referenceentityshowreadonlyform": false, "referencequerystringisprimarykey": true, "renderwebresourcesinline": true, "setentityreference": false, "showcaptchaforauthenticatedusers": false, "showownerfields": false, "showunsupportedfields": false, "submitbuttonbusytext": "Saving...", "submitbuttontext": "Save request details", "successmessage": "Your request details were saved.", "tooltipenabled": true, "validationsummaryheadertext": "Please fix the highlighted fields before saving.", "validationsummarylinksenabled": true }
